title: HS-01 Study Configuration
description: Input schema defining one runnable instance of the HS-01 study: phase structure, scales, pair response options, parallel forms, randomization, attention policy, demographics, consent. Binds to exactly one frozen item pool via pool_ref. Item-id references into the pool and the source-disjointness constraint across phases within a form are application-level checks.

doc_ref.description: e.g. vault path to HS-01 spec note at freeze commit.

locale.description: English UI — design decision 2026-06-11. Stimuli are verbatim regardless of locale.

phases.description: Fixed order (design decision: structured, not mixed): consent -> text -> image -> pair -> demographics. Order = array order.

trials_per_rater.description: Judgment phases only (text ~9, image ~9, pair ~15); null for consent/demographics.

examples: I can tell what this question is asking
I can tell what this image is displaying

point_labels.description: All five points verbally anchored, balanced (psychometric standard, design decision #5).

semantic_options.description: Responses are stored semantically, never positionally. ANCHOR_WORD/TARGET_WORD render as the cell's prompt words.

ab_order.description: Anchor/target word display order randomized per trial; the realized order is logged in the session record.

fixed_tail.description: OTHER_CLASS / NOTHING_RECOGNIZABLE / CANT_TELL always follow the two word options in fixed order.

other_class_free_text.description: If true, choosing OTHER_CLASS opens an optional free-text field.

forms.description: Parallel forms (2-3, design decision). Constraint enforced by the form builder: within one form, the source_ids behind text_items, image_items and pair_items are pairwise disjoint — no rater judges the same source twice. Across forms, every item should appear approximately equally often.

log_seed.description: Seed stored in the session record -> trial order fully reproducible.

item_ids.description: 1 nonsense text item + 1 obvious-class pair item (HS-01 §3).

placement.description: Indistinguishable from regular trials within their phase.

exclusion_fail_threshold.description: Pre-specified rule: failures >= threshold -> exclude rater (HS-01: 2 = fail both).

demographics_fields.description: HS-01 defaults: age_band; ml_familiarity (3-level: no_experience / some_exposure / regular_practice); english_proficiency (CEFR self-report A1-C2 / native); optional free comment.

render_check.description: On session start, render a known homoglyph string and verify it is not normalized (stimulus fidelity rule); result stored in session.environment.render_check.

min_rendered_image_css_px.description: Minimum on-screen image size; sessions on smaller viewports are refused at entry.
